task_context.actionable_question: Who is this student and what is their current overall situation?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Summarise who this student is and where they stand across all dimensions (score, engagement, risk) in plain language.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The student, identified as SAMPLE_OULAD_STU_100788, is a male aged between 0-35 years from Scotland. He has achieved a high average score of 91.2, indicating strong academic performance, but is categorized as high risk due to an at-risk score of 3, suggesting potential challenges in engagement despite a medium study effort level.

Insights: High Academic Achievement: The student has an average score of 91.2, which is significantly above typical passing thresholds, indicating strong academic performance. | High At-Risk Score: Despite the high average score, the student has an at-risk score of 3, categorized as high, which may indicate underlying issues affecting engagement.

Educational implications: The student demonstrates strong academic capabilities but may require interventions to enhance engagement and reduce risk.

Recommendations: high - Implement targeted engagement strategies. - To address the high at-risk score and improve overall student experience and retention.

insights.title: High Academic Achievement
insights.description: The student has an average score of 91.2, which is significantly above typical passing thresholds, indicating strong academic performance.

evidence.context: This score reflects a high level of understanding of the course material.

insights.title: High At-Risk Score
insights.description: Despite the high average score, the student has an at-risk score of 3, categorized as high, which may indicate underlying issues affecting engagement.

evidence.context: This score suggests the student may need additional support to maintain engagement.

educational_implications: The student demonstrates strong academic capabilities but may require interventions to enhance engagement and reduce risk.

recommendations.rationale: To address the high at-risk score and improve overall student experience and retention.

confidence.reason: The data provided is complete and reflects a single student's profile accurately.

required_core_outputs.description: Summarise who this student is and where they stand across all dimensions (score, engagement, risk) in plain language.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not extrapolate beyond returned score, engagement, and risk dimensions.
Avoid holistic judgements about the student when supporting data is absent.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
